error_signature: webhook not visible in the editor
title: Webhook not visible in n8n editor
symptom: The webhook appears to be functioning as it receives requests, but it is not visible in the n8n editor, leading to confusion about its status.
not_this_if: Webhook is visible in the editor
No requests are received by the webhook
root_cause: This issue can occur due to a glitch in the n8n editor where the webhook node does not refresh or display correctly, even though it is operational and receiving data as expected.
fix_steps: Check the executions in n8n to confirm the webhook is receiving requests.
Pin the webhook in the editor to ensure it is visible.
Refresh the n8n editor to see if the webhook appears.
agent_instruction: Check the executions and pin the webhook to make it visible in the editor.
